description: A scan of a detainer-response form shown as black text on white. The header has fields for an individual's name and date of birth and a date the request was received. A checklist section labeled DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FROM ICE/DHS lists several Immigration Detainer form types with checkboxes, including Form I-247A and a Warrant for Arrest of Alien, followed by a PROJECTED DISPOSITION OF REQUEST section with further checkbox options.
notable_text: DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FROM ICE/DHS; Form I-247A (Immigration Detainer - Notice of Action); Form I-200 (Warrant for Arrest of Alien); PROJECTED DISPOSITION OF REQUEST
